channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Death toll from U.S. boat strikes climbs after survivors not found
item.description: The death toll from the Trump administration's series of strikes on suspected drug trafficking boats has risen to at least 199 people.

item.title: Pam Bondi to face closed-door questioning from House lawmakers over Epstein files
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is appearing before House lawmakers investigating Jeffrey Epstein’s sexual abuse cases

item.title: Vance says U.S. and Iran are close but not yet at a deal
item.description: With the Strait of Hormuz blocked and conflict in Lebanon, both sides say no agreement has been reached.

item.title: Bondi to testify behind closed doors in House Epstein probe today
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will testify Friday before the House Oversight Committee about her handling of the Epstein files.
